items.title: Muse Spark 1.1
items.summary: Today, we’re excited to introduce Muse Spark 1.1, the latest model from Meta Superintelligence Labs and a significant upgrade from Muse Spark. Muse Spark 1.1 is a multimodal reasoning model built for agentic tasks, with major gains in tool and computer use, coding, and multimodal understanding.

items.title: The Harness Effect: How Orchestration Design Sets the Token Economics of Enterprise Agentic AI
